name: /incident --severity high recommends /postmortem follow-up to drive RUBRIC.yaml CLAUDE.md additions per F-5
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/incident.sh" 'data corruption' --date 2026-05-25 --severity high 2>err.txt && grep -q 'severity=high' err.txt && grep -q 'postmortem' err.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
